item.title: 'Why did you do that?' trace
steps: Implement decision log: record the rules, preferences, and context used for each agent action
Implement trace query: given an action ID, return the full decision chain
Implement natural language explanation: local LLM generates user-friendly explanation from trace
Allow corrections from trace context to feed into preference learning
acceptanceCriteria: Every agent action records its decision trace
User can query why any specific action was taken
Explanation cites specific rules and preferences
Corrections from trace context feed into preference learning
